target.title: fix: show WebChat preamble progress during tool activity
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Fixes an issue where users watching a long tool-using turn in the built-in WebChat UI saw tool activity and the final assistant response, but did not see the preamble/commentary prose that the runtime was already producing. The same turns showed commentary in ClickGlass, which made WebChat look silent even though the model was actively explaining progress.

## Why This Change Was Made

WebChat now consumes canonical `stream:"item"` events with `kind:"preamble"` and `progressText`, stores them as keyed chat stream segments, and materializes visible pre-final commentary before appending the final assistant message. Tool activity handling stays on the existing `stream:"tool"` path.

## User Impact

Users can see WebChat progress commentary during long Codex turns instead of waiting through a row of tool calls and a final answer only. This brings the built-in OpenClaw WebChat surface in line with ClickGlass for preamble visibility.

## Evidence

### Real behavior proof

**Behavior or issue addressed:** Built-in WebChat did not render preamble/commentary prose from `item/preamble` progress events while tool calls and final messages still rendered.

**Real environment tested:** OpenClaw 2026.6.9 built-in WebChat, Chisel direct WebChat session, live gateway, `openai/gpt-5.5` via the OpenAI Codex runtime.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch:**

1. Loaded the Chisel WebChat session in an isolated OpenClaw browser profile.
2. Verified the page was using the cache-busted WebChat bundle and updated service worker from the live hotfix.
3. Armed a page probe against `openclaw-app.chatStreamSegments`.
4. Ran a fresh tool boundary in the same turn.
5. Captured the live WebChat surface and annotated the resulting recording.

**Evidence after fix:** ![Annotated WebChat preamble proof](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ragesaq/openclaw/7372bcb3e0f7b14e96615257ba394f1e79fd54c1/.proof/webchat-preamble/webchat-preamble-after-annotated.gif)

**Observed result after fix:** WebChat rendered commentary preamble text as visible Chisel message blocks before and around tool activity rows, while tool activity stayed grouped and the session remained in progress.

**What was not tested:** Mobile/native wrapper surfaces were not tested. A separate before GIF from the old bundle was not recaptured on this PR branch; the before condition is covered by the old Control UI handler returning before non-tool item events, and by the reported live split where ClickGlass rendered commentary while WebChat did not.

**Proof limitations or environment constraints:** The proof uses a live isolated browser against the WebChat surface rather than a synthetic component fixture. Non-public hostnames and credentials are not included in the proof artifact.

**Before evidence:** Before this change, `ui/src/ui/app-tool-stream.ts` returned on `payload.stream !== "tool"` before any item-preamble handling, so `stream:"item"` events carrying `data.kind:"preamble"` and `data.progressText` were ignored by WebChat. ClickGlass remained a useful control because it rendered the same class of commentary from its own consumer.

### Tests and validation

- `pnpm exec vitest --run ui/src/ui/app-tool-stream.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.test.ts` passed, 147 tests.
- `pnpm tsgo:test:ui` passed.
- `pnpm exec oxlint ui/src/ui/app-tool-stream.ts ui/src/ui/app-tool-stream.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.test.ts` passed.
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check ui/src/ui/app-tool-stream.ts ui/src/ui/app-tool-stream.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.test.ts` passed.
- `git diff --check` passed.
- `pnpm -C ui build` passed and produced `dist/control-ui/assets/index-BWG93Py2.js`.
- Crabbox clean-room validation passed on a fresh PR checkout: `pnpm crabbox:run --provider local-container --fresh-pr openclaw/openclaw#95708 --preflight --timing-json -- bash -lc 'sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y nodejs npm && sudo npm install -g pnpm@latest && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm exec vitest --run ui/src/ui/app-tool-stream.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.test.ts'`. Lease `cbx_8b7c28c9b66d` / `blue-prawn`, Ubuntu 26.04, 2 files passed, 147 tests passed, total 3m51.791s.

### Review state

- HyperReview Reflex inline patch review passed with 0 findings.
- Attempted `codex review --base origin/main`; it was blocked locally by OpenAI API authentication returning 401 and by an unrelated malformed local skill header before review execution. No Codex findings were produced.

AI-assisted: authored by ragesaq, implementation by Chisel using `openai/gpt-5.5` via the OpenAI Codex runtime.
target.author: ragesaq
